name: WESCO INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: PART I . In this Annual Report on Form 10-K, Wesco refers to WESCO International, Inc., and its subsidiaries and its predecessors unless the context otherwise requires. References to we, us, our and the Company refer to Wesco and its subsidiaries. The Company WESCO International, Inc.
